testcase.name: explore Biz module structure
testcase.system-out:
=== Biz landing page === URL: https://omre.ai/biz Title: Omre Heading: What would you like to do?
-- Buttons (19) -- • SOCIAL • NEWS • VIDEO • CHAT • BIZ • LINK • LEARN • STUDIO • ORBIT • GAMES • MART • MEETINGS • WALLET • Toggle theme
-- Links (10) -- • "Browse Digital eBooks, courses, templates" → /biz/business/digital • "Browse Physical Goods, inventory, shipping" → /biz/business/physical • "Seller Dashboard Manage products & orders" → /biz/business/dashboard • "Website Builder Build your custom business website with a drag-and-drop editor — no code required. Build website" → /biz/website-builder • "Marketplace Discover products, services, and verified sellers from across the platform. Go to Mart" → /app/marketplace
